pillars.title: Self-Assessment
pillars.summary: Interactive readiness check scoring citizen preparedness across charter knowledge, crypto literacy, protocol familiarity, and governance comfort.

pillars.title: Path Discovery
pillars.summary: Interest-based routing to contribution tracks in engineering, governance, outreach, node operation, security, and documentation.

tools.title: Readiness Self-Check
tools.summary: Six-point checklist scoring citizen readiness with personalized guidance for charter review, crypto literacy, and governance participation.

tools.title: Contribution Path Finder
tools.summary: Interest selector mapping to engineering, governance, outreach, node operation, security, and documentation contribution paths.

tools.title: Petition Builder
tools.summary: Guided form for creating structured petitions with target authority, signature goals, deadlines, and charter citations.

tools.title: Feedback Submission
tools.summary: Categorized feedback intake with optional contact, subject tagging, and automatic routing to relevant ministry teams.

tools.title: Civic Activity Feed
tools.summary: Filterable, sortable feed of petitions, feedback, and governance actions with type, status, and date controls.

tools.title: Petition Signing
tools.summary: One-click signing with localStorage persistence, duplicate prevention, and real-time progress tracking toward escalation thresholds.

tools.title: Escalation Tracker
tools.summary: Public dashboard tracking petition escalations to Assembly, debate scheduling, voting records, and implementation status.

tools.title: Judicial Review Request
tools.summary: Structured request form for citizens to seek judicial review of feedback items, with docket tracking and precedent search.

guides.title: Citizen Onboarding Guide
guides.summary: Step-by-step walkthrough from charter review through first petition, feedback, or Corps application.

guides.title: Governance Participation Handbook
guides.summary: Comprehensive guide to Assembly sessions, committee work, petition thresholds, and escalation procedures.

reports.title: Tool Adoption & Effectiveness Q2 2026
reports.summary: Usage analytics, completion funnels, user satisfaction scores, and correlation with subsequent civic participation.
